raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, the tax account at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX who has done my taxes for the past XXXX  years, made a mistake : when I gave her my credit card, she put on it both the charge for her work ( {$410.00}, which was OK ), but she also put on my card, without my realizing until I got home, the {$7400.00} charge for the balance of my XXXX personal income tax. Upon seeing the error, I immediately called XXXX where the office manager apologized and offered to help me to resolve any problems. I also immediately called Citibank Credit Card ( XX/XX/XXXX ) and was told that I had to wait until the charge was posted to dispute it. My credit card showed, in addition to the legitimate {$410.00} charge, a charge for {$7400.00} and a " service fee '' of {$180.00} from the company that was supposed to pay the taxes in my behalf. The company listed for the XXXX unwanted charges was " XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX '' with the phone number -- XXXX XXXX  I think I missed putting in the company name in previous pages. The company about which I am complaining is Citi ( R ) Cards or Citi bank, XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX My own calls to the number both in XXXX and in early XXXX ( the phone is answered ... " XXXX  XXXX ) resulted in my being told that the company had NEVER received a request to pay my taxes and, therefore, had never paid them. Citibank should have received the same information from the company. 

After a week or XXXX had passed, Citibank removed the service fee charge of {$180.00} from my card account. BUT, they have continued to harass me for payment of the {$7400.00} phantom charge even though they have never given me proof of XXXX  XXXX or Citibank or anyone else paying my taxes and even though I have told them and gave them proof ( ACH payment ) that I had paid my own taxes from my personal bank account on XX/XX/XXXX, after first checking with the IRS to make sure that my taxes owed were, indeed, {$7400.00} on that date.
